name: magic-roguelike
description: Magic Roguelike — Vite React TS client, Node server, shared sim

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @magic-roguelike/shared && concurrently -k -n shared,server,client -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @magic-roguelike/shared" "npm run dev -w @magic-roguelike/server" "npm run dev -w @magic-roguelike/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @magic-roguelike/shared && npm run build -w @magic-roguelike/server && npm run build -w @magic-roguelike/client
scripts.icons:build-assets-atlas: npm run build -w @magic-roguelike/shared && node assets/pipelines/run-game-atlas-pipeline.mjs && npm run icons:registry
scripts.icons:build-assets-atlas:no-chroma: npm run build -w @magic-roguelike/shared && node assets/pipelines/run-game-atlas-pipeline.mjs --skip-chroma && npm run icons:registry
